ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Waiting for files to be created...

ast.name: title
ast.target: 将 dataview 插入当前笔记

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Python venv and faster-whisper will be automatically set up when you first run a transcription.
ast.target: 首次运行转录时，将自动设置 Python venv 和 faster-whisper。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Transcription is only available on desktop (Windows, macOS, Linux) from version 1.5.0 onwards. Mobile devices can create tiktok notes but cannot generate transcriptions.
ast.target: 转录功能仅适用于 1.5.0 及以上版本的桌面端（Windows、macOS、Linux）。移动设备可以创建 TikTok 笔记，但无法生成转录。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Local transcription requires Python, yt-dlp, ffmpeg, and faster-whisper.
ast.target: 本地转录需要 Python、yt-dlp、ffmpeg 和 faster-whisper。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Enabling transcription requires installing external dependencies (Python 3, yt-dlp, ffmpeg, and faster-whisper). These packages are installed separately on your system. See the Transcription Setup section in settings for installation instructions.
ast.target: 启用转录需要安装外部依赖项（Python 3、yt-dlp、ffmpeg 和 faster-whisper）。这些软件包单独安装在您的系统上。有关安装说明，请参阅设置中的“转录设置”部分。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: By default, temporary files are automatically cleaned up. Transcriptions are saved directly in notes.
ast.target: 默认情况下，临时文件会自动清理。转录内容直接保存在笔记中。

ast.name: error
ast.source: TikToker: File not found for transcription update:
ast.target: TikToker：未找到用于转录更新的文件：

ast.name: error
ast.source: TikToker: Failed to update file with transcription:
ast.target: TikToker：无法更新文件转录内容：

ast.name: error
ast.target: 获取 GitHub 发布版本失败：

ast.name: error
ast.target: TikToker 调试 - oEmbed 失败：
